parsed_review.summary: CP00-626 is a descriptor-only Risk A pack (RP20.P05.M03.S01-S10, 10 units; 6 fixture / 1 claude_review / 3 implementation) reviewed read-only via Read/Grep/Glob. Pack binding, plan binding (closeout-pack-plan.json CP00-626, deviation_from_plan=false), contract projections (cp626_pack_binding/requirements/no_write_attestation + cp626_p05_primary_implementation_head_descriptor), registry constants, the descriptor builder (service.js:2869), and tests (model.test.js:969-1010) are mutually consistent: covered_units=10, section_count=1, micro_title "Primary Implementation Slice", and deliverable counts (6/1/3) match everywhere, including the deliverable-type classifier. The validator (validators.js:2352) and tests enforce all descriptor-only, no-write, no-real-data, and no-runtime boundaries (data room / VDR / RFI / CP / closing-binder / access-analytics dispatch, object storage, audit/permission writes, Hermes runtime receipt, and every primary-implementation/fixture/golden-case/review-required/denied/cross-tenant runtime flag all false), and the authority boundary (claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true). The Hermes packet is descriptor-only (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), used solely for deterministic evidence packet shape, not product runtime; the Claude packet is read_only with Read/Grep/Glob and the full CP178+ forbidden_review_evidence list (not_logged_in, zero_byte_output, malformed_json, fenced_json_only, tool_call_shaped_output, missing_raw_output, missing_source_inspection_basis, claude_final_approval_claim, source_mutation_claim, enterprise_trust_claim). All 9 required public exports are present and re-exported via index.js; README documents CP00-626; the freeze-result chain leaks no stale source refs. The review harness is correctly configured (readiness auth preflight passed exit 0 with valid JSON, validation-report shows forbidden tools absent, schema present, source_inspection_mode=read_tools_used). The descriptor-layer production_ready candidacy is fully supported and runtime_ready correctly remains false (no runtime opened). Pending adjudication.md / construction-inspection.json / command-evidence.json are downstream of this read_only_claude_run step in the hardening sequence and are not blockers. changed-file-scope correctly isolates pack files from unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook, ldip), which are not attributed to this pack. This is an independent read-only PASS recommendation; Claude is not the final approver and human final approval / enterprise-trust closure remain outside this receipt. No P0-P3 findings.
